modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting out of office replies for shared email account.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to figure out how to set up out of office replies for my shared email account in Office 365. I have several email accounts, and it's a bit confusing to manage them all. Can you please guide me on how to do this for the shared account? I really want to make sure that anyone emailing gets an automatic response when I'm away.
short_description: Need help setting out of office replies for shared email account.
